post.subject: HoYo FEST Official Website Sharing Event
post.content:
Hello, Trailblazers!
At this moment in time, please put aside the things that keep you busy and cheer loudly for the universe~
To make it easier for everyone to stay informed about the event, we are very excited to announce that the HoYo FEST 2024 official website is now live! 🎉
Share this message with more people, and your kindness will manifest into a bargaining chip. It might even win you an unexpected surprise!
The HoYo FEST official website that Miss Herta (did not) help create: 
https://hoyo.link/4F6jFBAL

〓 HoYo FEST Official Website Sharing Event 〓
【How to Participate】
Share the SNS post on the Honkai: Star Rail Official Account and tag at least two of your friends, then upload a screenshot of the shared post to the comments section of this HoYoLab post to participate in the lucky draw.

【Event Duration】
2024/07/18 11:00 – 2024/07/23 23:59 (UTC+8)

【Event Rewards】
500 Stellar Jades × 1 winner
120 Stellar Jades × 10 winners
Lordly Trashcan Mystery Box (One Box) x 60 Winners
60 Stellar Jades × 100 winners
After the event's conclusion, we will be contacting you through the official account~
* Additional terms and conditions apply. Please see the HoYo FEST website for more details.

* Terms and Conditions:
1. This event will be available across multiple platforms and regions, and comments from all regions will be considered together. The above rewards are shared across all platforms and regions, with 171 winners and no fixed reward distribution ratio for each region.
2. Each Trailblazer is only eligible to receive one reward. Multiple sharing of the post will only be counted once, and each game account can only redeem the reward once.
3. The following actions will be regarded as invalid: Content that violates the rules of the platform, content plagiarized or taken without consent from other creators, content that has no relation to the event or Honkai: Star Rail, comments that contain any form of advertising, comments spreading malicious rumors or discrediting the game and its characters.
4. Please make sure your comment on the post is retained until 2024/08/31 for subsequent verification.
5. Trailblazers, please authorize your account to receive private messages from the official Honkai: Star Rail HoyoLab Message Notifications. If the private message cannot be sent, it will be considered a forfeiture of the reward.
6. If you are selected as a winner, please pay attention to private messages from the organizers, and enter your UID, contact details, and other information in accordance to the instructions you receive. Winners who have not provided their information by 2024/08/10 23:59 (UTC+8) will be deemed to have voluntarily forfeited their prizes.
7. Please note that once your UID information is confirmed, it cannot be changed later. The personal information provided by Trailblazers is for internal use only and will not be disclosed to third parties without your consent.
8. Prizes are expected to be issued within 90 business days after the announcement of the results. When that time comes, winners will only need to claim the prize in-game.
9. For more details on the privacy policy of this event, please visit the game's official website. The collection and use of all personal information will strictly adhere to that outlined in the privacy policy.
10. We recommend you set up your email address to receive mail from the @hoyoverse.com domain to prevent mail related to the event from being sent to the Junk folder.
